title: The Peculiar Pumpkin Thief
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: On Halloween, a mysterious clown thief locks the whole city inside Mystery Park — can Geronimo and Hercule stop him? 🎃

q.en: Who is Geronimo's detective friend who helps solve the Halloween mystery?
q.zh: 帮助杰罗尼摩破解万圣节谜案的那位侦探朋友是谁？

explain.en: Hercule Poirat, the famous detective, hides in a pumpkin at the party store and later flies a helicopter to rescue Geronimo.
explain.zh: 名侦探赫丘勒·波瓦先是躲在派对商店的南瓜里，后来又开直升机把杰罗尼摩救了出来。

q.en: What was missing from the farmers' market just before Halloween?
q.zh: 万圣节前夕，农贸市场上什么东西不见了？

explain.en: Every pumpkin in New Mouse City had been stolen, so the farmer showed pictures of his missing produce and asked people to call the police.
explain.zh: 鼠城所有的南瓜都被偷光了，农夫只好举起失踪蔬菜的照片，请大家报警。

q.en: Who sent the orange 'Open... if you dare!' invitations to Mystery Park?
q.zh: 那封橙色‘敢就拆开……’的神秘公园邀请函是谁发出的？

explain.en: The evil clown Chuckles built Mystery Park and invited the whole city, then locked the gates to rob their houses.
explain.zh: 邪恶的小丑查克尔斯建造了神秘公园，邀请全城居民，随后锁上大门去洗劫大家的家。

q.en: What covered the mysterious tower that rose in the center of town?
q.zh: 在镇中心突然冒出来的神秘高塔外面包着什么？

explain.en: A gigantic tower covered by an orange tarp appeared in the middle of town; it was later revealed to be Chuckles's Clown Tower headquarters.
explain.zh: 镇中央出现了一座裹着橙色防水布的巨大高塔，后来才发现那是查克尔斯的小丑塔总部。

q.en: How did Geronimo manage to get out of the locked Mystery Park?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩是怎样逃出被锁住的神秘公园的？

options.en: Hercule pulled him up with a helicopter hook
options.zh: 赫丘勒用直升机上的钩子把他吊了上去

explain.en: Hercule flew a clown-faced helicopter overhead and dropped a steel hook; Geronimo grabbed it and was reeled up.
explain.zh: 赫丘勒驾驶一架小丑脸直升机飞到上空，放下一根钢钩，杰罗尼摩抓住后被吊了上去。

q.en: What caused the stolen helicopter to crash into the sea?
q.zh: 被偷来的直升机为什么会坠入海中？

options.en: A banana peel stuck under the control panel
options.zh: 一块香蕉皮卡在了操纵面板下面

explain.en: Hercule tossed a banana peel over his shoulder and it got stuck under the control panel, making the helicopter sputter and fall into the water.
explain.zh: 赫丘勒把香蕉皮往肩后一甩，皮卡在了操纵面板下面，导致直升机熄火并坠入水中。

q.zh: 查克尔斯的弱点是什么？

options.en: He is afraid of the dark
He is very sentimental and cries at sad stories
options.zh: 他极易伤感，听悲伤的故事会哭

explain.en: The book says Chuckles's weak point is that he is very sentimental and sobs like a newborn at sad stories.
explain.zh: 书里说查克尔斯的弱点是他非常感性，听到悲伤的故事会像新生儿一样大哭。

q.en: How did Hercule force Chuckles to give up the password?
q.zh: 赫丘勒是如何逼查克尔斯说出密码的？

options.zh: 他跟查克尔斯打了一架

options.en: He threatened to call the police
He told a sad story that made Chuckles cry
options.zh: 他讲了一个悲伤的故事，把查克尔斯讲哭了

explain.en: Hercule told a tale of a tiny mouse and a strawberry eaten by a wolf; Chuckles wept, and Hercule made him reveal the password.
explain.zh: 赫丘勒讲了小老鼠和一颗被狼吃掉的草莓的故事，查克尔斯听了落泪，只好说出密码。

q.en: What saved Geronimo and Hercule when they fell from the flying tower?
q.zh: 当两人从会飞的高塔上掉下去时，是什么救了他们？

explain.en: Hercule had listened to Granny Ironwhiskers and brought his chute; a yellow parachute opened and they landed safely.
explain.zh: 赫丘勒听了铁胡须奶奶的话随身带了降落伞，一顶黄色降落伞打开，两人平安落地。

q.en: Which famous painting did the clown army steal from the National Mouseum?
q.zh: 小丑大军从国家老鼠博物馆偷走了哪幅名画？

explain.en: Geronimo watched the thieves carry the priceless 'Mona Mousa' out of the National Mouseum.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩亲眼看着小偷把价值连城的《莫娜·莫莎》从国家老鼠博物馆搬走。
